overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia exploring a misty forest environment. The character walks through dense vegetation, discovers a rocky coastal area with giant skeletal remains and an abandoned tent, then continues along a winding mountain trail. The atmosphere is moody and overcast with high-fidelity game graphics.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense coniferous forest trail with tall grass

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily uphill through dense vegetation with two swords strapped to his back

entered.detail: Dense evergreen trees forming the forest canopy ahead
Tall wild grasses and ferns lining the trail sides
Distant mountain visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a dense, misty forest with tall pine trees and thick undergrowth. The path winds uphill through the natural terrain with mountains visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal wasteland with abandoned camp and giant remains

events.description: exits dense forest into open rocky wasteland with scattered boulders
character turns around at the coastal overlook to head back toward the forest

agents.ego_description: Geralt approaches a red tent, observes the surroundings including giant skeletal remains, then turns back toward the forest

notable_agents.action: standing near the red tent, facing away from the camera

entered.detail: Small red-orange canvas tent with wooden poles, abandoned camp
Massive curved bones of a giant creature protruding from the rocky ground
Weathered wooden barrels near the tent
Open view of the ocean and coastline in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a rocky coastal wasteland where an abandoned red tent sits among boulders. Geralt approaches the camp, passes a stationary figure, and reaches a viewpoint with massive giant bones overlooking the sea before turning back.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain forest trail with coastal proximity

events.description: leaves rocky wasteland and re-enters forested trail path
large rock formation becomes visible on left side near coastal cliff

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the forest path with mountains visible ahead, maintaining a consistent pace

entered.detail: Massive boulder formation beside the path overlooking the coast
Steep cliff edge dropping down to the ocean
Winding dirt trail through the forest with patches of grass

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues along a winding dirt path through the forest, with a large rock formation and coastal cliff on the left and dense trees on the right. The trail gradually ascends with mountain peaks visible in the distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dense, misty forest into a desolate coastal wasteland before returning to a winding mountain ascent. It begins with Geralt navigating through tall pine trees and thick undergrowth on a path that winds uphill toward distant mountains. As the forest thins, the scene opens into a rocky wasteland where the camera passes an abandoned red tent and a stationary figure, eventually reaching a viewpoint dominated by massive giant bones overlooking the sea. The perspective then shifts back toward the interior, following Geralt along a dirt path flanked by a steep coastal cliff and dense woodland. Finally, the trail gradually ascends through the rugged terrain, heading toward the looming mountain peaks in the distance.
